title: chore(deps): update module github.com/sigstore/fulcio to v1.8.3 [security]
body:

| Package | Change | [Age](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [Confidence](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/sigstore/fulcio](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio) | `v1.8.1` -> `v1.8.3` | ![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fsigstore%2ffulcio/v1.8.3?slim=true) | ![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fsigstore%2ffulcio/v1.8.1/v1.8.3?slim=true) |

---

> [!WARNING]
> Some dependencies could not be looked up. Check the Dependency Dashboard for more information.

### GitHub Vulnerability Alerts

#### [CVE-2025-66506](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/security/advisories/GHSA-f83f-xpx7-ffpw)

Function [identity.extractIssuerURL](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/blob/main/pkg/identity/issuerpool.go#L44-L45) currently splits (via a call to [strings.Split](https://pkg.go.dev/strings#Split)) its argument (which is untrusted data) on periods.

As a result, in the face of a malicious request with an (invalid) OIDC identity token in the payload containing many period characters, a call to `extractIssuerURL` incurs allocations to the tune of O(n) bytes (where n stands for the length of the function's argument), with a constant factor of about 16. Relevant weakness: [CWE-405: Asymmetric Resource Consumption (Amplification)](https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/405.html)

Details
See [identity.extractIssuerURL](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/blob/main/pkg/identity/issuerpool.go#L44-L45)

Impact
Excessive memory allocation

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>sigstore/fulcio (github.com/sigstore/fulcio)</summary>

#### Vulnerability Fixes

- <https://github.com/sigstore/fulcio/security/advisories/GHSA-f83f-xpx7-ffpw>; prevents OOM condition due to malformed OIDC token ([#​2233](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/issues/2233))

#### Features

- feat: Add support for skipping email\_verified claim requirement per issuer ([#​2220](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/issues/2220))
- add meta-issuer circleci block ([#​2215](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/issues/2215))
- add circleci info to fulcio ([#​2192](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/issues/2192))

#### Testing

- Add basic E2E tests ([#​2230](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/issues/2230))

### [`v1.8.2`](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/blob/HEAD/CHANGELOG.md#v182)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/compare/v1.8.1...v1.8.2)

#### Testing

- make email address in test cases rfc822 conformant ([#​2205](https://redirect.github.com/sigstore/fulcio/issues/2205))

</details>
